hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; command -v uvx >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; PYTHONUTF8=1 uvx code-review-graph@2.3.7 update --skip-flows --repo "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || true

cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'; exit 0; }; command -v uvx >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; PYTHONUTF8=1 uvx code-review-graph@2.3.7 status --repo "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || true
